result.summary: Found several visual issues, mainly content being clipped/obscured by fixed navigation and horizontally truncated items that may reduce usability on mobile.

issues.description: The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the game grid content. The lower game cards are partially hidden behind the bottom tab bar.
issues.suggestion: Add sufficient bottom padding or safe-area spacing to the scrollable content so cards are not covered by the fixed navigation.

issues.description: Several game cards on the right side are cut off, showing only partial thumbnails and labels. This makes the grid feel horizontally overflowing or misaligned.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the game carousel/grid is intentionally scrollable with proper snap behavior, or adjust card widths/gutters so visible cards fit cleanly within the viewport.

issues.description: The top category navigation is horizontally clipped, with the 'Hot Games' tab only partially visible.
issues.suggestion: If this is a horizontal carousel, add clearer scroll affordance or spacing. Otherwise, resize tabs so labels are not cut off on the initial viewport.

issues.description: The hero carousel arrows sit very close to the screen edges and partially overlap the banner content, which looks cramped.
issues.suggestion: Increase horizontal padding for carousel controls or position them within a dedicated safe area over the banner.
